@@ -70,2 +70,3 @@ - * Standard over time. Upgrades to newer versions of the Unicode Standard - * occurred in the following Java releases, each indicating the new version: + * Standard over time. The following tables list the version of Unicode used + * in each Java release. Unless otherwise specified, all update releases in a + * given Java release family use the same Unicode version. @@ -73,0 +74,3 @@ + * @@ -81,0 +85,24 @@ + * Java SE 25 + * Unicode 16.0 + * Java SE 21 + * Unicode 15.0 + * Java SE 17 + * Unicode 13.0 + * Java SE 11 + * Unicode 10.0 + * Java SE 8 + * Unicode 6.2 + * + * + *
+ * Show other Java releases + *

Java releases prior to Java SE 8 are listed only if they upgraded the + * Unicode version

+ * + * + * + * + * + * + * @@ -83,0 +111,2 @@ + * + * @@ -89,0 +119,4 @@ + * + * + * + * @@ -91,0 +125,2 @@ + * + * @@ -95,2 +131,2 @@ - * - * + * + * @@ -99,2 +135,0 @@ - * - * @@ -113,0 +147,2 @@ + * + *

Shows other Java releases and supported Unicode + * versions
Java releaseUnicode version
Java SE 23Unicode 15.1
Java SE 18Unicode 13.0
Java SE 16Unicode 13.0
Java SE 14Unicode 12.1
Java SE 11Unicode 10.0
Java SE 10Unicode 8.0
Java SE 8Unicode 6.2
